description_long: This is a square-based pedestal sculpture with intricate bronze relief panels on each side, each depicting different scenes with human figures in classical attire. The top surface is flat and appears to be made of a darker, polished material, possibly stone or metal, contrasting with the ornate bronze sides. The reliefs show various interactions: one side features three figures in a dramatic pose, another shows two figures with one seated and the other standing, a third side displays two figures holding a banner with the inscription 'P.C.W.BELUTH', and the last side depicts two figures in a gesture of greeting or exchange. The edges of the pedestal are decorated with a repeating pattern, adding to the classical aesthetic. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative or historical theme, likely intended for public display in an urban or park setting.
description: A square pedestal sculpture with detailed bronze reliefs of human figures on each side and a flat, dark top surface. The panels depict classical scenes, possibly commemorative or historical.
description_view_0: This view shows a relief with three figures, one central and elevated, flanked by two others in dynamic poses.
description_view_1: This side features two figures, one seated and one standing, with a star-shaped motif in the background.
description_view_2: This panel displays two figures holding a banner inscribed with 'P.C.W.BELUTH', both standing and facing forward.
description_view_3: This view shows two figures in a gesture of greeting or exchange, with subtle background detailing.
attribute_subject_matter: classical human figures in relief, possibly commemorative or historical scenes
attribute_location_context: No visible context; likely intended for outdoor urban or park installation based on design.
